title: [codereview pass 2/3] TestSignedData missing test for current_channel/rx_channel inclusion in signed_data()
description: project-LICHEN-3i18 Python test_signed_data does not have dedicated test asserting channel byte is in signed_data at correct offset (after seq_num). This is the core security binding for CCP-9. Add it. P2 test coverage. File:python/tests/announce/test_messages.py:147
